5.3.1.4 SoftmaxFlashV2
Function Usage
Serves as the enhanced version of SoftmaxFlash, corresponding to the
FlashAttention-2 algorithm. If the product of non-last axis lengths of the input
tensor [m0, m1, ..., mt, n] (t ≥ 0) is considered as m, the shape of the input tensor
is [m, n]. This API performs the following computation on the input tensor [m, n]
